ClockNodes.Name: 32KIN
ClockNodes.Signpost: The 32KIN pin should be connected to an external clock source and cannot be configured.

ClockNodes.Name: 32KOUT
ClockNodes.Signpost: The 32KOUT pin receives the output from the ERTCO and cannot be configured.

ClockNodes.Name: HFXIN
ClockNodes.Signpost: The HFXIN pin should be connected to an external clock source and cannot be configured.

ClockNodes.Name: HFXOUT
ClockNodes.Signpost: The HFXOUT pin receives the output from the ERFO and cannot be configured.

ClockNodes.Name: RTC
ClockNodes.Signpost: The RTC is a 32-bit binary timer that keeps the time of day up to 136 years.

ClockNodes.Name: PWR SEQ
ClockNodes.Signpost: The Power Sequencer is always enabled.

ClockNodes.Name: WUT
ClockNodes.Signpost: The Wake-Up timer is always enabled.

ClockNodes.Name: INRO
ClockNodes.Signpost: To use this oscillator, please select the INRO in one of the clock source multiplexers.

ClockNodes.Name: LPO
ClockNodes.Signpost: To use this oscillator, please select the LPO in one of the clock source multiplexers.

ClockNodes.Name: SYSCLK_DIV_2
ClockNodes.Signpost: This divider has a fixed divisor of 2 and cannot be configured.

ClockNodes.Name: AHBCLK_DIV
ClockNodes.Signpost: On MAX32650, the AHB CLK runs at the same frequency as the System Clock, so no clock divider is used.

ClockNodes.Name: Radio DBB
ClockNodes.Signpost: To enable the Radio DBB, please enable the Bluetooth peripheral on the canvas.

ClockNodes.Name: CM4 (CPU0)
ClockNodes.Signpost: To set up the clock for the Cortex-M4, please configure the multiplexers and dividers on the canvas.

ClockNodes.Name: ERTCO
ClockNodes.Signpost: Use of the ERTCO may be controlled by configuring the ERTCO Bypass multiplexer on the canvas.

ClockNodes.Name: ERFO
ClockNodes.Signpost: Use of the ERFO may be controlled by configuring the ERFO Bypass multiplexer on the canvas.

ClockNodes.Name: OBRC
ClockNodes.Signpost: To use this oscillator, please select the OBRC in one of the clock source multiplexers.

ClockNodes.Name: HSO
ClockNodes.Signpost: To use this oscillator, please select the HSO in one of the clock source multiplexers.

ClockNodes.Name: SQWOUT
ClockNodes.Signpost: The multiplexer for pins P0.19 or P0.27 should be set to MISC_SQWOUT using the Pin Config tool.

Outputs.Name: BLE_PCLK
Outputs.Description: Clock for Bluetooth to Communicate With Bus

ClockNodes.Name: P0.23
ClockNodes.Signpost: The multiplexer for pin P0.23 should be set to OSC_AUDCLK using the Pin Config tool.

ClockNodes.Name: CM4 (CPU1)
ClockNodes.Signpost: To set up the clock for the Cortex-M4, please configure the multiplexers and dividers on the canvas.

ClockNodes.Name: HSO_DIV_4

Fields.Name: HIRC_EN
Fields.Description: 60MHz High Frequency Internal Reference Clock Enable
Fields.Documentation: 60MHz High Frequency Internal Reference Clock Enable.

Fields.Name: HIRC96M_EN
Fields.Description: 96MHz High Frequency Internal Reference Clock Enable
Fields.Documentation: 96MHz High Frequency Internal Reference Clock Enable.

Fields.Name: HIRC8M_VS
Fields.Description: 8MHz High Frequency Internal Reference Clock Voltage Select
Fields.Documentation: This register bit is used to select the power supply to the HIRC8M.

Fields.Name: SDHCFRQ
Fields.Documentation: This bits defines the clock frequency of SDHC.

Fields.Name: ADCFRQ
Fields.Documentation: ADC Clock Frequency = Periph_Clock/adcfrq. Values 0 and 1 invalid.

Fields.Name: AONCD
Fields.Documentation: These bits define the AON domain clock divider.

Fields.Name: AUDCLKSEL
Fields.Documentation: These bits define the Audio clock selection.

Fields.Name: MODE
Fields.Documentation: This two bit field selects the current operating mode for the device. Note that code execution only occurs during ACTIVE mode.

Fields.Name: GPIOWKEN
Fields.Documentation: This bit enables all GPIO pins as potential wakeup sources. Any GPIO configured for wakeup is capable of causing an exit from IDLE or STANDBY modes when this bit is set.

Fields.Name: RTCWKEN
Fields.Documentation: This bit enables RTC alarm as wakeup source. If enabled, the desired RTC alarm must be configured via the RTC control registers.

Fields.Name: USBWKEN
Fields.Documentation: This bit enables USB IRQ as wakeup source.

Fields.Name: WUTWKEN
Fields.Documentation: This bit enables the Wake-Up Timer as wakeup source.

Fields.Name: AINCOMP_WE
Fields.Documentation: This bit enables AIN COMP as wakeup source.

Registers.Documentation: Each bit controls the GPIO_EN setting for one GPIO pin on the associated port. These bits configure the corresponding device pin for digital I/O or an alternate function mode. The fields can be modified directly by writing to this register or indirectly through GPIOn_EN0_SET or GPIOn_EN0_CLR.

Registers.Documentation: Each bit controls the GPIO_EN setting for one GPIO pin on the associated port. These bits configure the corresponding device pin for digital I/O or an alternate function mode. The fields can be modified directly by writing to this register or indirectly through GPIOn_EN0_SET or GPIOn_EN0_CLR.

Fields.Name: HTEN
Fields.Documentation: This bit enables the Real Time Clock. This bit can only be written when WE=1 and BUSY =0. Change to this bit is effective only after BUSY is cleared from 1 to 0.

Fields.Name: ADE
Fields.Documentation: Change to this bit is effective only after BUSY is cleared from 1 to 0.

Fields.Name: ASE
Fields.Documentation: Change to this bit is effective only after BUSY is cleared from 1 to 0.

Fields.Name: BUSY
Fields.Documentation: This bit is set to 1 by hardware when changes to HTimer registers required a synchronized version of the register to be in place.  This bit is automatically cleared by hardware.

Fields.Name: RDY
Fields.Documentation: This bit is set to 1 by hardware when the HTimer count registers update.  It can be cleared to 0 by software at any time. It will also be cleared to 0 by hardware just prior to an update of the HTimer count register.

Fields.Name: ALDF
Fields.Documentation: This alarm is qualified as wake-up source to the processor.

Fields.Name: ALSF
Fields.Documentation: This alarm is qualified as wake-up source to the processor.

Fields.Name: WE
Fields.Documentation: This register bit serves as a protection mechanism against unintentional writes to critical HTimer bits.

Fields.Name: RAS
Fields.Documentation: An Alarm is triggered when this value matches HTIMER_SEC[19:0].

Registers.Name: HTMR0_RSSA

Fields.Name: RSSA
Fields.Description: This Register Contains the Reload Value for the Short Interval Alarm
Fields.Documentation: This Register Contains the Reload Value for the Short Interval Alarm.

Registers.Documentation: This register contains the reload value for the short interval alarm, HTIMER_CTRL.alarm_ss_fl is raised on rollover.

Registers.Name: HTMR0_SEC
Registers.Documentation: This register contains the 32 most significant bits of the counter.

Registers.Name: HTMR0_SSEC
Registers.Documentation: This counter ticks ever t_htclk (16.48uS). HTIMER_SEC is incremented when this register rolls over from 0xFF to 0x00.

Fields.Name: PRES
Fields.Documentation: Set the Timer's prescaler value. The prescaler divides the PCLK input to the timer and sets the Timer's Count Clock, F_CNT_CLK = PCLK (HZ) /prescaler. The Timer's prescaler setting is a 4-bit value with pres3:pres[2:0].

Registers.Name: TMR0_CNT
Registers.Documentation: This register stores the current timer count.

Fields.Name: PWM
Fields.Documentation: Timer PWM Match: in PWM Mode, This Field Sets the Count Value for the First Transition Period of the PWM Cycle. at the End of the Cycle Where CNT Equals PWM, the PWM Output Transitions to the Second Period of the PWM Cycle. the Second PWM Period Count is Stored in the CMP Register. the Value Set for PWM Must Me Less Than the Value Set in CMP for PWM Mode Operation. Timer Capture Value: in Capture, Compare, and Capture/Compare Modes, This Field is Used to Store the CNT Value When a Capture, Compare, or Capture/Compare Event Occurs.
